cancun.title: Cancun All-Inclusive Escape 🌴
cancun.description: Indulge in effortless luxury along Cancun's iconic coastline, where turquoise waters meet world-class service.
cancun.imagineText: Wake to warm sea breezes, footsteps in powder sand, and the soft rhythm of the Caribbean just beyond your suite. Every detail is tailored to make the day feel indulgent, calm, and utterly unforgettable.

tulum.title: Tulum Eco-Luxury Retreat 🌿
tulum.description: Experience Tulum's signature blend of barefoot luxury and natural beauty in an intimate, design-forward setting.
tulum.imagineText: Follow the scent of salt and garden flowers to an open-air suite where candlelit dinners and private ocean swims create a sense of pure serenity. Every moment is curated to feel warm, effortless, and deeply personal.
specialItems: ✓ Private beach access and curated wellness

isla.title: Isla de Mujeres Private Island Experience 🏝️
isla.description: Escape to Isla de Mujeres, a tranquil Caribbean sanctuary known for its crystal-clear waters and refined island charm.
isla.imagineText: Picture a private terrace with sunset cocktails, the ocean glowing in gold, and barefoot strolls between palm-fringed pools and the shore. This is a place where luxury feels relaxed, effortlessly personal, and perfectly paced.
